cleaning_steps.name: Cohort confirmation
cleaning_steps.details: Analytical cohort confirmed at n=2,413 NOA patients from Royan Institute Andrology Clinic (MUMS).

cleaning_steps.name: Outcome integrity check
cleaning_steps.details: Outcome prevalence confirmed: 886 positive (36.7%) and 1,527 negative (63.3%).

cleaning_steps.name: Feature-space alignment
cleaning_steps.details: Final feature matrix aligned to 45 features (37 numeric + 8 categorical).

cleaning_steps.name: Pathology extraction QA
cleaning_steps.details: 18 bilateral pathology features extracted from free-text reports with RT_/LT_ split.

cleaning_steps.name: Imputation & scaling
cleaning_steps.details: kNN imputation with missingness indicators and Z-score standardization on continuous variables.

cleaning_steps.name: Imbalance handling
cleaning_steps.details: SMOTE applied on training folds only.

cleaning_steps.name: Validation protocol lock
cleaning_steps.details: Nested CV with stratified splitting and bootstrap confidence intervals (1000 iterations).

eighteen_pathology_features.description: 18 pathology features extracted bilaterally from free-text reports.

transformations.name: Nested cross-validation
transformations.method: Leakage-safe nested CV protocol for model development and verification.

transformations.name: kNN imputation + missingness encoding
transformations.method: Missing values imputed with kNN while preserving missingness signals.

transformations.name: Class imbalance handling
transformations.method: SMOTE applied only on training data.

transformations.name: Calibration
transformations.method: Isotonic + Platt scaling with Brier monitoring.
